parents.subject: LU-18222 doc: update man page with lqa_quota_ops

commit.subject: LU-20152 llite: pin dump_page_cache entry
commit.message:
LU-20152 llite: pin dump_page_cache entry

pin dump_page_cache in debugfs blocking debugfs_remove_recursive()
till the file is closed. otherwise racing umount can destroy
ls_obj_hash hashtable in parallel leading to an oops/panic.

Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Ia1bb9037b6eaec921fe953f6f47d4930c02b38c9
